title: Lopholepis tecta
taxonomy: Lopholepis tecta is classified as a species of fern within the genus Lopholepis, which belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This genus is further grouped under the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The order Polypodiales is a group of ferns characterized by the presence of a sori, which are clusters of spores. The class Polypodiopsida is a large group of ferns, including the genera Blechnum and Woodwardia, among others. Overall, Lopholepis tecta's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the fern family.
